payload.content:
Follow the style of these six worked examples, one per question type:

Lookup — Table: Book,Author; A,Smith; B,Jones. Q: Who wrote B? A: Jones

Aggregation — Table: Player,Points; Alice,10; Bob,15; Carol,20. Q: Total points? Reasoning: 10+15+20=45. A: 45

Superlative — Table: City,Pop; Lyon,500; Paris,2100; Nice,340. Q: Largest city? A: Paris

Count — Table: Country,Medals; France,3; Spain,2; Italy,5. Q: How many countries won >2 medals? A: 2

Filter — Table: Item,Price; Pen,2; Book,15; Lamp,40. Q: Items over 10? Reasoning: Book (15) and Lamp (40). A: Book, Lamp

Comparison — Table: Runner,Time; Ada,12.1; Ben,11.4. Q: Who was faster, Ada or Ben? Reasoning: 11.4 < 12.1. A: Ben
